hausa.use_modus_ponens_p_q_and_p_gives_q: Yi amfani da Modus Ponens: P→Q da P suna ba da Q
hausa.use_modus_tollens_p_q_and_q_gives_p: Yi amfani da Modus Tollens: P→Q da ¬Q suna ba da ¬P
hausa.hs_chains_p_q_and_q_r_then_mp_with_p: HS yana haɗa P→Q da Q→R, sannan MP da P
hausa.disjunctive_syllogism_p_q_and_p_gives_: Kiyasin rabuwa: P∨Q da ¬P suna ba da Q
hausa.conjunction_gives_p_q_then_modus_ponen: Haɗi yana ba da P∧Q, sannan Modus Ponens yana ba da R
hausa.chain_p_q_and_q_r_with_hs_then_again_w: Haɗa P→Q da Q→R da HS, sannan kuma da R→S, sannan MP
hausa.mt_on_p_q_gives_p_then_ds_on_p_r_gives: MT akan P→Q yana ba da ¬P, sannan DS akan P∨R yana ba da R
hausa.hs_gives_p_r_then_mt_with_r_gives_p: HS yana ba da P→R, sannan MT da ¬R yana ba da ¬P
hausa.truth_tables_every_input_combination_e: Tebur na gaskiya — kowace haɗin shigarwa, kowace fitarwa
hausa.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Don masu canji n, teburin yana da layuka 2ⁿ. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — kowace ƙofa shafi ɗaya ce kawai. Aljebra ta Boolean (Boole, 1854) ita ce tushen kowace da'irar dijital, kowace tambayar bincike, da kowane sharaɗi a cikin lamba.
hausa.proof_builder_derive_conclusions_step_: Mai gina hujja — fitar da ƙarshe mataki-mataki
hausa.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, kiyasin zato, kiyasin rabuwa — ƙa'idodin tunani takwas suna rufe yawancin lojik na bayani na gabatarwa. Kowane mataki yana tabbatar da kansa da SUNA, ba da ji ba.
hausa.challenges_graded_tautology_contradict: Ƙalubale — wasannin ƙwaƙwalwa na tautology da sabani masu matakai
hausa.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = koyaushe gaskiya; sabani = koyaushe ƙarya; yiwuwa = wani lokaci duka biyu. Dokar Aristotle ta rashin sabani (350 KZ) ita ce doka mafi tsufa da aka buga. Aikin AP CS Principles + gabatarwar lissafi mai rarrabuwa.
hausa.logic_gates_transistors_all_the_way_do: Ƙofofin lojik — transistor har zuwa ƙasa
hausa.nand_is_functionally_complete_you_can_: NAND tana cika aiki sosai — za ka iya gina kowace wata ƙofa daga NAND kawai. CPU na zamani yana da kusan transistor biliyan 10 da ke aiwatar da lissafin Boolean iri ɗaya da kake ginawa a nan.
hausa.probability_logic_inference_under_unce: Lojik na yiwuwa — tunani a ƙarƙashin rashin tabbas
hausa.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P da Q kowanne yana ɗauke da yiwuwa maimakon gaskiya/ƙarya mai ƙarfi. Don abubuwan da ke faruwa masu zaman kansu, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Kalli yadda iyakar tabbaci ke canza yiwuwa mai laushi zuwa tunani mai rarrabuwa.
hausa.drag_tiles_or_click_to_add: Ja taloli ko danna don ƙarawa
hausa.drop_symbols_here_or_click_above: Saki alamomi a nan ko danna sama…
hausa.toggle_english_and_formal_notation: Canza tsakanin rubutun Hausa da na yau da kullun
hausa.enter_an_expression_above_to_generate_: Shigar da furci a sama don ƙirƙirar tebur na gaskiya
hausa.ai_explain_truth_table_expression: AI: bayyana furcin tebur na gaskiya
hausa.logiclab_data_table: tebur na bayanai na dakin gwajin lojik
hausa.your_interests_basketball_cooking_vide: Abubuwan da kake so (ƙwallon kwando, dafa abinci, wasannin bidiyo...)
hausa.your_interests_for_ai_personalization: Abubuwan da kake so don keɓance AI
hausa.loading_ai_content: Ana loda abun ciki na AI
hausa.is_this_argument_valid: Shin wannan hujja tana da inganci?
hausa.ai_generated_is_this_argument_valid: AI ya ƙirƙira: shin wannan hujja tana da inganci?
hausa.can_we_conclude_the_butler_is_innocent: Za mu iya yanke hukuncin cewa mai hidima ba shi da laifi?
hausa.will_it_go_in_the_display_case: Shin zai shiga cikin akwatin nuni?
hausa.can_we_conclude_the_creature_has_no_wi: Za mu iya yanke hukuncin cewa halittar ba ta da fikafikai?
hausa.is_the_gold_in_cave_b: Shin zinariyar tana cikin Kogo B?
hausa.can_we_conclude_no_dark_clouds: Za mu iya yanke hukuncin cewa babu gizagizai masu duhu?
hausa.toggle_inputs_to_see_the_output_live: Canza shigarwa don ganin fitarwa kai tsaye
hausa.open_in_truth_tables: Buɗe a cikin Tebur na gaskiya
hausa.open_in_truth_tables_2: 📊 Buɗe a cikin Tebur na gaskiya →
hausa.p_likely_q_uncertain: 🟡 P mai yiwuwa; Q mara tabbas
hausa.sliders_for_p_q_truth_probabilities_co: Masu zamewa don yiwuwar gaskiyar P, Q da iyakar tabbaci. Sakamakon tunani mai rarrabuwa na yanayi 4. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.independence_vs_correlation_when_does_: 'Yancin kai da alaƙa — kowanne yana aiki yaushe?
hausa.how_does_threshold_change_inference_ou: Yaya iyaka ke canza sakamakon tunani?
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_state_inference: Bayanin ƙira: alamar tunani mai rarrabuwa na yanayi 4; babu makin yiwuwa; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.toggle_educational_panel_what_is_propo: Canza fanel na ilimi: Menene lojik na bayani?
hausa.propositional_logic_studies_how_the_tr: Lojik na bayani yana nazarin yadda gaskiyar maganganu masu rikitarwa ke dogara da masu sauƙi. Wata
hausa.is_any_statement_that_is_either_true_o: ita ce kowace magana da ke ko gaskiya ko ƙarya — kamar «Ana ruwan sama» ko «2 + 2 = 4».
hausa.valid_vs_invalid_arguments: Hujjoji masu inganci da marasa inganci
hausa.argument_guarantees_the_conclusion_if_: hujja tana tabbatar da ƙarshe IDAN tushe gaskiya ne. Wata
hausa.argument_fallacy_has_a_logical_gap_eve: hujja (kuskuren lojik) tana da gibin lojik — ko da tushe gaskiya ne, ƙarshe ba lallai ya biyo ba.
hausa.common_fallacies_affirming_the_consequ: Kura-kuran lojik na gama-gari: tabbatar da sakamako (P→Q, Q ∴ P✗), ƙaryata farko (P→Q, ¬P ∴ ¬Q✗)
hausa.truth_tables_boolean_logic_at_a_glance: 🔍 Tebur na gaskiya — lojik na Boolean a kallo ɗaya
hausa.truth_table_visualization_cycling_thro: Hoton tebur na gaskiya da ke zagayawa ta ƙofofin lojik AND, OR, XOR da NAND.
